title: React Composition
body:
## Definition

**Composition** builds UI by nesting components and slots (`children`, render props, compound components) instead of giant prop lists or inheritance.

## Why it exists

Flexible layouts without prop drilling every variant through wrappers.

## How it works

```jsx
<Card>
  <Card.Header title="Stats" />
  <Card.Body>{content}</Card.Body>
</Card>
```

Share behavior via [custom hooks](concept:custom-hooks), share structure via composition.

## Common confusion

“Composition over inheritance” — React rarely uses class inheritance for UI variants.

## In practice

Design systems, layout shells, flexible modals and menus.

## Definition

**[Composition](concept:react-composition)** builds UI by nesting components and slots (`children`, render props, compound components) instead of giant prop lists or inheritance.

## Why it exists

Flexible layouts without [prop drilling](concept:prop-drilling) [every](concept:array-some-every) variant through wrappers.

## How it works

```jsx
<Card>
  <Card.Header title="Stats" />
  <Card.Body>{content}</Card.Body>
</Card>
```

Share behavior via [custom hooks](concept:custom-hooks), share structure via [composition](concept:react-composition).

## Common confusion

“[Composition](concept:react-composition) over inheritance” — React rarely uses [class](concept:es6-class) inheritance for UI variants.

## In practice

Design systems, layout shells, flexible modals and menus.
